title: ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) Framework
description: Master the ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) framework for building interactive AI agents. Architect agentic loops where the model observes, thinks, and acts by calling external APIs or executing code in a sandboxed environment.
objectives: Master the ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) framework for building interactive AI agents.
Architect agentic loops where the model observes, thinks, and acts by calling external APIs or executing code in a sandboxed environment.
